goal: Ship v8.5 provider adapter execution pilot boundary.
risk: AOF treats provider adapter pilot activity as safe execution while approval, dry-run/default-deny, redaction, rollback, provenance, stop conditions, or not-proven boundaries are missing.
loss_boundary: No v8.5 release claim unless provider adapter pilots are auditable bounded experiments and Mission Control exposes pilot readiness.
acceptance_gates: provider-adapter-pilot-audit fails missing or unsafe pilot evidence
release-state-audit gates v8.5 on provider adapter pilot audit
evidence_plan: provider adapter pilot record, provider adapter pilot audit, Mission Control projection, focused tests, release-state audit, Council review
stop_conditions: stop if pilot readiness implies production execution authority
stop if write-mode pilot can pass without approval evidence
